command: Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE.
command_text: term-llm ask --no-session --text --stats --yolo --provider venice:grok-4-20 --max-turns 30 --agent ./agent --read-dir . --write-dir ./workspace -f ./SPEC.md "Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE."
prompt: Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE.

stats.raw: Stats: 103.6s (llm 69.0s + tool 34.6s) | 25k in (cache: 86k read) → 13k out (last: 21k→23, peak: 21k) | 7 tools | 8 llm calls
